iq_requirements.protocol_title: Installation Qualification Protocol — Waters ACQUITY UPLC H-Class System
iq_requirements.iq_scope: Verification that the Waters ACQUITY UPLC H-Class System is installed according to the manufacturer's specifications and site requirements at NovaBridge Pharmaceuticals, Inc. QC Laboratory, Room 214.
regulatory_references: 21 CFR Part 211 — Current Good Manufacturing Practice
ICH Q2(R1) Validation of Analytical Procedures
FDA Guidance for Industry: Analytical Procedures and Methods Validation (2015)
Waters IQ/OQ/PQ Installation Qualification Protocol Rev. 4

iq_tests.description: Verify instrument received per purchase order, all components present, no shipping damage
iq_tests.acceptance_criteria: All components match packing list; no visible damage; serial numbers match purchase order

iq_tests.description: Verify installation site meets manufacturer environmental requirements
iq_tests.acceptance_criteria: Temperature 15-30°C; Humidity 20-80% RH non-condensing; Vibration-free bench; Dedicated 120V/20A circuit

iq_tests.description: Verify all modules correctly connected per Waters installation diagram
iq_tests.acceptance_criteria: All fluidic connections leak-free; all electrical connections secure; Ethernet connections active

iq_tests.description: Verify Empower 3 chromatography data system installed and licensed
iq_tests.acceptance_criteria: Empower 3 FR4 or higher installed; instrument drivers loaded; license valid

iq_tests.description: Record firmware version for each module and verify against qualified version list
iq_tests.acceptance_criteria: QSM firmware ≥ 1.70; SM-FTN firmware ≥ 1.70; CM firmware ≥ 1.70; TUV firmware ≥ 2.15

iq_tests.description: Verify safety features operational and utilities properly supplied
iq_tests.acceptance_criteria: PEEK tubing intact; solvent waste connected; fume exhaust connected; UPS operational
